title: Redo Announces $81 Million Series B to Support Commerce Technology Expansion
body: Draper, Utah, June 23, 2026
Commerce technology platform secures major funding round
Led by Smash Capital with existing investor participation

title: Agenda
body: Financing details and valuation milestone
Current platform adoption and merchant base
Leadership perspectives on market opportunity
Strategic use of capital for AI development
Network infrastructure and operations model
ReturnBear acquisition and international expansion

title: Series B Financing Overview
body: Redo raised $81 million in Series B funding
The financing values the company at $1.25 billion
Round led by Smash Capital
Existing investors Pelion Venture Partners and Cervin Ventures participated

title: Platform Adoption Scale
body: More than 4,100 brands use the Redo platform today
Over 1,750 merchants use multiple Redo offerings across the suite
Platform demonstrates cross-product engagement with merchant base

title: CEO Vision: Merchant-Shopper Relationships
body: Sterling Snow serves as co-founder and CEO of Redo
Snow states every merchant is fighting to own the relationship with their shoppers
Funding allows acceleration of that mission and building infrastructure brands need

title: Investor Thesis on Market Expansion
body: Paul Szurek represents lead investor Smash Capital
Redo started by building trust with merchants through post purchase experiences
Company has expanded into a much larger opportunity beyond initial focus

title: AI-Driven Commerce Tools Development
body: New capital will fund development of AI-driven commerce tools
Investment focuses on next-generation shopping and marketing capabilities
Suite designed to enhance merchant-customer engagement

title: Agentic Shopping Experiences
body: Platform will include agentic shopping experiences
Experiences tailored to individual shoppers
AI agents personalize the shopping journey

title: Marketing Agent for Campaigns
body: Marketing agent capability for personalized email campaigns
Agent also handles personalized text campaigns
Automation targets customer communication at scale

title: Post-Purchase Concierge Service
body: Post-purchase concierge service under development
Service designed to increase customer lifetime value
Focuses on relationship extension beyond transaction

title: Returns Network Infrastructure
body: Aaron Evett serves as chief commerce officer
Network allows customers to return products locally
Company can inspect, refurbish, re-fulfill, and reship inventory through network

title: ReturnBear Acquisition
body: Redo announced the acquisition of ReturnBear alongside the financing
Acquisition extends returns servicing coverage to more than 100 countries
Deal expands geographic reach of returns infrastructure

title: International Expansion Plans
body: Company outlined plans for international expansion of its merchant network
Expansion strategy follows ReturnBear acquisition
Growth aims to serve merchants and customers across global markets

title: Strategic Outlook
body: Redo positioned to accelerate commerce infrastructure development
Combined funding, acquisition, and AI investments support merchant ownership of customer relationships
Platform expansion targets comprehensive post-purchase and engagement solutions at global scale
